prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年最低位次约15285→14579→13663→14532→12020，整体呈波动中前移趋势（位次数字减小），近3年累计前移约1643名；2025年基准约12020名，较2024年前移约2512名，为近年最高水平；该校在上海市2021–2026年招生计划均为8人，连续6年持平，无扩招或缩招；在考生总数大幅增加的背景下，相对竞争有所加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名从2021年第113名持续上升至2026年第97名，排名稳步提升，对考生吸引力略有增强；2022年曾出现偏负面声誉事件（学校管理受批评），但近年无明显负面舆情；抖音热度评价为「一般」，短视频平台曝光量中等，未出现明显报考热度信号；化学工程与技术为A-学科，是该校唯一A-及以上学科，与自动化、数据科学等招生专业关联度有限，对整体报考热度拉动作用较弱。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 自动化（电气/自动化类高热推荐）、数据科学与大数据技术（计算机类推荐）等专业社会热度较高；上海市2026年高考考生总数约66700人，较2025年约49276人增加约35%，竞争显著加剧；太原理工大学位于山西省，在上海招生人数极少（每年仅8人），上海考生对省外中西部211高校的地域偏好相对较低，跨省报考意愿有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动前移趋势、2026年招生计划持平、上海考生总数大幅增加约35%以及学校排名稳步上升等因素：考生总数激增使竞争加剧，推动位次后移（数字增大）；学校排名上升有轻微正面作用，但招生计划不变且地域偏好有限，正面作用不足以抵消竞争加剧的影响。预计2026年最低位次约12200名，较2025年小幅后移约180名，区间11700–12700名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 数据科学与大数据技术
- 自动化。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 智能感知工程。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间（11700–12700名）内，建议以二档智能感知工程为主攻方向、一档数据科学与大数据技术和自动化作为冲刺、三档机械设计制造及其自动化作为保底；位次明显优于区间下限（<11700名）可重点冲刺一档热门专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking was approximately 15285 → 14579 → 13663 → 14532 → 12020, showing a fluctuating but overall forward trend (decreasing ranking numbers). In the past 3 years, it has moved forward by about 1643 places. The 2025 baseline is approximately 12020, moving forward by about 2512 places compared to 2024, the highest level in recent years. The university's enrollment plan in Shanghai from 2021 to 2026 is 8 students per year, unchanged for 6 consecutive years, with no expansion or reduction. Against the backdrop of a significant increase in the total number of examinees, relative competition has intensified.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university. The Soft Science main ranking has steadily risen from 113th in 2021 to 97th in 2026, showing a continuous improvement in ranking, slightly enhancing its appeal to examinees. In 2022, there was a somewhat negative reputation incident (university management criticized), but no significant negative public opinion in recent years. Douyin heat evaluation is 'average', with moderate exposure on short video platforms, showing no obvious sign of application heat. Chemical Engineering and Technology is an A- discipline, the only A- or above discipline at the university, with limited relevance to enrollment majors such as Automation and Data Science, having a weak pull on overall application heat.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Automation (highly recommended in Electrical/Automation category) and Data Science and Big Data Technology (recommended in Computer category) have high social popularity. The total number of examinees in Shanghai for the 2026 college entrance exam is approximately 66,700, an increase of about 35% compared to approximately 49,276 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. Taiyuan University of Technology is located in Shanxi Province, with very few enrollment places in Shanghai (only 8 per year). Shanghai examinees have relatively low regional preference for 211 universities in central and western provinces outside the province, with limited willingness to apply across provinces.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating forward trend of historical rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the significant increase of about 35% in the total number of Shanghai examinees, and the steady rise in university ranking: the surge in examinee numbers intensifies competition, pushing the ranking backward (increasing numbers); the rise in university ranking has a slight positive effect, but the unchanged enrollment plan and limited regional preference mean the positive effect is insufficient to offset the impact of intensified competition. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for 2026 will be approximately 12,200, moving backward by about 180 places compared to 2025, with a range of 11,700–12,700.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Data Science and Big Data Technology
- Automation.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (11,700–12,700), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Intelligent Perception Engineering as the main direction, with Tier 1 Data Science and Big Data Technology and Automation as reach goals, and Tier 3 Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation as safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<11,700), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 popular majors.
